goals.description: Hit 'Submit' on the assignment at 90% to silence the panic and prove I'm not a failure, even if it's slightly late.
goals.rationale: My 'impulsive' time horizon means I only care about stopping this immediate spike of anxiety right now. The deadline passed (Mon 13:30), and my 'avoidant' nature screams that asking for an extension or explaining the delay will cause too much social friction with prof_assignment. Submitting now feels like a desperate attempt to control the narrative without admitting weakness. I don't care about the long-term cost of a partial grade; I just need to close this tab before my brain explodes.
